errors: Grid size exceeds maximum allowed (82944 > 65535) for 1D grid launch, causing potential kernel launch failure on GPUs with max grid size 65535.
suggested_fixes: Cap the number of blocks to 65535 and rely on the grid-stride loop to cover all elements, or use a 2D grid to distribute blocks.
warnings: Vectorized loads/stores assume 16-byte alignment without checking, which may lead to unaligned access and performance degradation or undefined behavior on some architectures.
